Class Properties.SecureAccess.LegalAdvisor 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----Properties.SecureAccess.LegalAdvisor
public class LegalAdvisor
extends Object
implements LegalAdvisorInterface, Runnable
La clase LegalAdvisor implementa un consejero legal general para la propiedad de SecureAccess.
